stable_equation.strength_term: A_stable = mix(S_steady_plus_score, R_steady_plus, S_steady_score, M_brain_direct_v20, R_train_v26)
stable_equation.learning_term: L_stable = mix(L_steady_plus, L_steady, D_feature_v20, B_plastic_v26, R_train_v26)
stable_equation.system_term: M_stable = A_stable + S_stable + R_stable + L_stable + R_stable_sys - P_stable
